author: harjeb
text: Started project initialization. flutter create . --platforms=android exceeded 120s on first run; checking generated files and rerunning with longer timeout if needed.

author: harjeb
text: Flutter project skeleton created with Android-only platform. Next step: run pub get, analyze, and capture Android SDK requirement for APK builds.

author: harjeb
text: Verification: flutter pub get succeeded; flutter analyze passed with no issues; flutter test passed; flutter doctor -v reports missing Android SDK, which blocks apk builds until configured.

author: harjeb
text: Created docs/product_requirements.md and docs/development_plan.md. Included claymorphism UI constraints from UI_DESIGN.md, single-player adaptation of yahtzee rules, local best-score requirement, architecture proposal, persistence strategy, testing scope, and milestone plan. Assumptions called out for ambiguous scoring details.

author: harjeb
text: Fix terminology from Speedboat Dice to Yahtzee, add explicit dice animation implementation strategy, and create an execution-ready task breakdown document with deliverables and verification criteria.

author: harjeb
text: Updated docs to use Yahtzee terminology consistently, documented concrete dice animation strategy, and added docs/execution_task_list.md with 10 execution-ready tasks, target files, acceptance criteria, and verification commands.

author: harjeb
text: Starting Tasks 1-4: replace Flutter counter template with app shell, claymorphism theme foundation, Yahtzee home card, and shared_preferences-backed leaderboard storage. Next step: patch pubspec and create lib/app, lib/core, and lib/features scaffolding.

author: harjeb
text: Completed Tasks 1-6 foundation work. Implemented app shell, clay theme, home screen, shared_preferences leaderboard, Yahtzee scoring engine, and Yahtzee session controller. Verification passed: flutter pub get, flutter analyze --no-pub, flutter test. Next step: Task 7 animated dice widgets, then gameplay screen and result flow integration.

author: harjeb
text: Continuing with Tasks 7-10: animated dice widgets, gameplay screen integration, result flow, and polish. Next step: inspect current Yahtzee files and patch Riverpod gameplay state plus UI components.

author: harjeb
text: Completed Tasks 7-10. Added Riverpod-driven Yahtzee gameplay state, animated clay dice widgets, full score-sheet interaction, end-of-run result screen with leaderboard persistence, and widget coverage for gameplay and result flows. Verification passed: flutter analyze --no-pub and flutter test.
